mapper.select: SELECT vr.id, vr.is_current, vr.remark, vr.created_at, br.id AS r_id, br.route_number AS r_route_number, br.route_name AS r_route_name, br.sub_type AS r_sub_type, br.start_stop AS r_start_stop, br.end_stop AS r_end_stop, br.down_start_stop AS r_down_start_stop, br.down_end_stop AS r_down_end_stop, br.is_loop AS r_is_loop, br.route_type AS r_route_type FROM vehicle_route vr JOIN bus_route br ON vr.route_id = br.id WHERE vr.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY vr.is_current DESC, vr.created_at DESC

SELECT vr.id, vr.is_current, vr.remark, vr.created_at, v.id AS v_id, v.plate_number AS v_plate_number, br.id AS r_id, br.route_number AS r_route_number, br.route_name AS r_route_name, br.sub_type AS r_sub_type, br.start_stop AS r_start_stop, br.end_stop AS r_end_stop, br.down_start_stop AS r_down_start_stop, br.down_end_stop AS r_down_end_stop, br.is_loop AS r_is_loop, br.route_type AS r_route_type FROM vehicle_route vr JOIN vehicle v ON vr.vehicle_id = v.id JOIN bus_route br ON vr.route_id = br.id WHERE vr.route_id = #{routeId} ORDER BY vr.is_current DESC, vr.created_at DESC

SELECT vr.id, vr.is_current, vr.remark, vr.created_at, br.id AS r_id, br.route_number AS r_route_number, br.route_name AS r_route_name, br.sub_type AS r_sub_type, br.start_stop AS r_start_stop, br.end_stop AS r_end_stop, br.down_start_stop AS r_down_start_stop, br.down_end_stop AS r_down_end_stop, br.is_loop AS r_is_loop, br.route_type AS r_route_type FROM vehicle_route vr JOIN bus_route br ON vr.route_id = br.id WHERE vr.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND vr.route_id = #{routeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle_route (vehicle_id, route_id, is_current, remark) VALUES ( #{vehicle.id}, #{route.id}, #{isCurrent}, #{remark} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vehicle_route WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND route_id = #{routeId}
